positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a stylized celestial landscape. A crescent moon and three distinct, glowing constellations (Orion, Ursa Major, and a stylized Pegasus) are arranged in a perfect semicircle over a subtly textured, deep indigo sky. Below the constellations, silhouettes of a single mountain range and a gentle forest line are visible. The composition should feature clean lines, negative space, and strong, high-contrast silhouettes. Color palette must use limited, impactful colors: matte black, deep indigo, metallic gold for the stars, and a gentle emerald green for the forest. The style should be geometric, modern, and highly suitable for repeat pattern or centered apparel print. Vector art, clean lines, solid fill, crisp edges, rule of thirds composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, ugly, noise, extra limbs, realistic photo, photorealistic, gradients (unless intentional for glow)
